claims: The repository contains a target shell for max-radius Boolean constructor obligations.
The target shell records the obstruction after the same-radius Boolean rollup: combining formulas with locality input surfaces at possibly different radii.
The target shell explicitly includes a radius monotonicity obligation.
nonclaims: Does not prove max-radius conjunction closure.
Does not prove max-radius disjunction closure.
Does not prove shared-radius Boolean family recursion.
Does not prove existential quantifier handling.
Does not prove arbitrary formula-radius construction.
Does not prove Gaifman locality for unguarded first-order logic.
Does not prove general finite model theory closure.
